text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are on an<n>uninhabited
island for some rest. Just<n>as we're about to
leave...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack, we missed the last train! Well,<n>the last boat.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru told me there<n>was still time
before the last<n>departure.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Finding this suspicious, I press her on<n>the topic...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
N-no, well, you see... All right, you got<n>me! Or not...
What I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I lied to you about the time<n>on purpose.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to be stranded on this island<n>with you. And
it has to be today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's actually supposed to be a<n>meteor shower
happening here<n>tonight...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I just had to see it with you andmake my wish! No ifs, ands, or buts!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Like, something like this might never<n>happen
again. That's why I couldn't<n>help trying anything
and everything to<n>create this memory with you.
choice_data_list: You could have just told it to me straight...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But if you'd said no, I wouldn't have<n>been able to
take it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you'd told me you'd rather die than<n>stay and
watch, I don't know what<n>I'd have done. I
would've probably<n>just fallen to my knees and
begged<n>right here on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'd never say something like that to<n>begin with...
At any rate, we decide to<n>watch the meteor
shower together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, it's almost time. It's going<n>to be the best
ever, ever, ever, ever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Meteor showers are so powerful,<n>aren't they?
Seeing all these<n>heavenly bodies whiz by makes
me<n>feel like I could run just as fast...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, here come some more! Look at<n>them zoom!
They should be called<n>Matikanefuku-komets
instead!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is so beautiful, I'm getting<n>emotional. Oh, if
only I could watch<n>this forever...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I feel like something is slipping<n>my mind.
What is it you're supposed<n>to do when you see a
shooting star<n>again?
choice_data_list: You're supposed to make a wish.
You're supposed to sprint along the beach.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, that's it! I have tons of<n>wishes backed
up! Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: May we attain many glorious<n>victories together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Loads and loads of them! One race<n>for every
meteor in the sky! Pretty<n>please!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two of us wish as hard as we<n>can for
Matikanefukukitaru to seize<n>countless victories.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I did it again, Trainer! I won! I won<n>again!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This is thanks to all that<n>wishing we did
while watching the<n>meteor shower.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to visit that uninhabited island<n>again! If we
become castaways and<n>end up washed ashore,
then so be it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's talking like we're in some kind<n>of survival
flick. That aside, it looks<n>like wishing on that
meteor shower<n>did have some out-of-this-world
benefits.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Was that it? ...Well, I guess having a<n>meteor to
race against is a unique<n>opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right! Wait for me, meteors! We'll<n>see who can
make it around the<n>world first!

Matikanefukukitaru runs off without a<n>care in the
world. Right across the<n>beach, along the shore...
and then into<n>the water.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gulp! Gurgle! Trainer... hrulp mreee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She comes concerningly close to<n>actually
drowning.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

I can't believe it! I won yet again!<n>What did you
make of that speed?! I<n>flew in like a meteor!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Looks like those meteors rubbed off<n>on me when I
was chasing after<n>them. What a miracle that is!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I think almost drowning has improved<n>her lung
capacity.
